inputs.label: Motor Rated Power
inputs.businessContext: Nominal power of the motor at full load

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal power of the motor at full load
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance nominale du moteur en pleine charge
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia nominal del motor a plena carga
businessContext_i18n.ar: القدرة الاسمية للمحرك عند الحمل الكامل

inputs.label: Actual Load
inputs.businessContext: Actual mechanical power drawn by the driven equipment

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual mechanical power drawn by the driven equipment
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik edilen ekipman tarafından çekilen gerçek mekanik güç
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche mechanische Leistungsaufnahme der angetriebenen Ausrüstung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Puissance mécanique réelle absorbée par l'équipement entraîné
businessContext_i18n.es: Potencia mecánica real consumida por el equipo accionado
businessContext_i18n.ar: القدرة الميكانيكية الفعلية المسحوبة بواسطة المعدة المشغلة

inputs.label: Insulation Max Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable winding temperature (insulation class limit)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable winding temperature (insulation class limit)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzin verilen maksimum sargı sıcaklığı (yalıtım sınıfı limiti)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température maximale admissible du bobinage (limite de classe d'isolation)
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura máxima permitida del devanado (límite de clase de aislamiento)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى درجة حرارة مسموح بها للملفات (حد فئة العزل)

inputs.label: Rated Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Standard ambient temperature for motor design (typically 40°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard ambient temperature for motor design (typically 40°C)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor tasarımı için standart ortam sıcaklığı (tipik olarak 40°C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température ambiante standard pour la conception du moteur (généralement 40°C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura ambiente estándar para el diseño del motor (típicamente 40°C)
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة البيئة القياسية لتصميم المحرك (عادة 40 درجة مئوية)

inputs.label: Thermal Time Constant
inputs.businessContext: Time for the motor temperature to reach 63.2% of its steady-state rise

businessContext_i18n.en: Time for the motor temperature to reach 63.2% of its steady-state rise
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor sıcaklığının kararlı hal artışının %63,2'sine ulaşması için geçen süre
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, bis die Motortemperatur 63,2 % ihres stationären Anstiegs erreicht
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire pour que la température du moteur atteigne 63,2 % de son élévation en régime permanent
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo para que la temperatura del motor alcance el 63.2% de su aumento en estado estacionario
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت اللازم لوصول درجة حرارة المحرك إلى 63.2% من الارتفاع الثابت

inputs.label: Duty Cycle
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of time motor runs under load (0-1, 1 = continuous)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of time motor runs under load (0-1, 1 = continuous)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motorun yük altında çalıştığı sürenin oranı (0-1, 1 = sürekli)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der Zeit, in der der Motor unter Last läuft (0–1, 1 = Dauerbetrieb)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction du temps pendant laquelle le moteur fonctionne en charge (0-1, 1 = continu)
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción de tiempo que el motor funciona bajo carga (0-1, 1 = continuo)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الوقت الذي يعمل فيه المحرك تحت الحمل (0-1، 1 = مستمر)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
